purpose: Test whether first raids or completed acceptance of known intraday external liquidity become tradable when completed 1m displacement and aggressive flow agree. The 1-3% daily challenge target is excluded from rule selection.

causal_clock.source: checksum-verified continuous Binance USD-M 1m trade klines
causal_clock.decision: after a completed 1m event plus a completed 1, 3 or 5 minute confirmation block
causal_clock.entry: actual next 1m open exactly at confirmation close
causal_clock.rolling_features: computed from completed rows only and shifted before the event minute
causal_clock.gap_policy: never interpolate; invalidate events and holding paths crossing a gap

known_levels.PREVIOUS_H1: high/low of immediately preceding complete UTC hour, fixed for the current hour
known_levels.PREVIOUS_H4: high/low of immediately preceding complete UTC-aligned four-hour block, fixed for the current block
known_levels.PREVIOUS_DAY: high/low of immediately preceding complete UTC day
known_levels.ASIA_SESSION: 00:00-08:00 UTC high/low, usable only from 08:00 UTC through day end
known_levels.freshness: first raw raid or crossing of a level instance and side consumes that instance before quality thresholds

branches.RAID_RECLAIM: minute trades through a known level and closes back inside; trade away from the raided side
branches.CLOSE_ACCEPTANCE: prior completed minute close is inside and event minute closes outside; trade with the break

canonical.stop: far extreme of event plus confirmation block, buffered 0.10 prior ATR15

costs.reason: maximum hold is four hours and the first structural screen excludes funding; any selected candidate is later rechecked with exact funding

selection.score: maximize min development/validation lb80 mean R, then min PF, then R per operating day
